subject: WM-0050 ready for review
body: Repaired WM-0050 review findings: denied sleep interruptions no longer mutate driver state, reservation-specific reasons now round-trip through trace and snapshot serialization, and tickRecovery preflights need ownership before progress mutation; added regressions and reran typecheck, focused Vitest, sim-core test, taskctl validate/status, diff check, and pnpm quality.
